name: GSD-OC
description: GSD lifecycle orchestration for OpenClaw — native, no Claude Code.

engageMode.description: When to auto-engage GSD: 'workspace' = coding cwd + coding intent (default); 'intent' = coding intent ANYWHERE (no cwd requirement — for non-fixed-dir setups); 'off' = no auto-engage (gsd_* tools still work).

codingRoots.description: Extra directories to treat as coding workspaces (in addition to project markers). Supports ~ and $VAR. Use this for code dirs that aren't named codeWS or live elsewhere; multiple dirs allowed.

includeDefaultRoot.description: Include the built-in $HOME/codeWS default root. Set false to rely only on codingRoots + project markers (.git/package.json/etc).

workerAgent.description: Allowlisted base agent that hosts GSD subagent personas when the orchestrator drives.

autoEngage.description: Master switch for auto-engage. false (or engageMode 'off') disables prompt-injection engagement.

disabled.description: Disable GSD-OC engagement entirely (equivalent to engageMode 'off').
